allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); routes=list\(data.get\('routes',{}\).keys\(\)\); [print\(r\) for r in routes if 'banner' in r.lower\(\) or 'ad' in r.lower\(\) or r not in ['/wp/v2','/wp/v2/posts','/wp/v2/pages','/wp/v2/media','/wp/v2/users','/wp/v2/comments','/wp/v2/categories','/wp/v2/tags','/wp/v2/statuses','/wp/v2/types','/wp/v2/taxonomies','/wp/v2/settings','/wp/v2/themes']]")
